skills.name: Site Sniffer
skills.description: Classify a site, extract surface signals, and produce a structured profile without changing the target.
skills.failure_contract: Return a safe profile with evidence gaps if the page cannot be resolved.

skills.name: Page Snapshotter
skills.description: Capture page metadata, headings, links, images, and budget markers for analysis.
skills.failure_contract: Emit partial snapshots and mark pages as unavailable if rendering fails.

skills.name: Style Extractor
skills.description: Derive a content style profile, tone, and visual language from the existing site.
skills.failure_contract: Fall back to a neutral editorial style when brand signals are insufficient.

skills.name: Content Opportunity Finder
skills.description: Identify high-value SEO content opportunities, gaps, and snippet candidates.
skills.failure_contract: Return opportunities only from observed signals and never invent traffic claims.

skills.name: Adaptive Component Generator
skills.description: Generate page modules that improve intent match, readability, and conversion support.
skills.failure_contract: If a component cannot be generated safely, omit it and keep the page intact.

skills.name: Technical SEO Patcher
skills.description: Patch metadata, canonical tags, structured data, and crawlability defects.
skills.failure_contract: Abort if the patch would remove canonical integrity or critical content.

skills.name: Schema Builder
skills.description: Author safe schema markup for products, articles, organizations, and FAQs.
skills.failure_contract: Emit valid schema or nothing at all.

skills.name: Internal Link Builder
skills.description: Propose internal link paths that strengthen authority flow and discovery.
skills.failure_contract: Keep anchors natural and never generate deceptive link text.

skills.name: Ad Slot Auditor
skills.description: Evaluate page locations for native or programmatic ad inventory without harming UX.
skills.failure_contract: Return a do-not-recommend result when ad placement would violate policy or trust.

skills.name: Provider Integrator
skills.description: Match safe ad providers and sponsorship templates to the inventory plan.
skills.failure_contract: Never select providers that are incompatible with the brand or inventory policy.

skills.name: Ad Wrapper Renderer
skills.description: Render compliant ad containers and preserve the surrounding layout contract.
skills.failure_contract: Disable the wrapper if it overlaps CTAs or exceeds the allowed density.

skills.name: Ad Telemetry Binder
skills.description: Attach safe telemetry hooks for ad viewability, CTR, and revenue snapshots.
skills.failure_contract: Skip telemetry when it cannot be instrumented without privacy or policy risk.

skills.name: GitHub PR Creator
skills.description: Package the plan into a pull request with preview evidence and rollback notes.
skills.failure_contract: If the PR cannot be created, keep the artifact local and report the reason.

skills.name: CMS Plugin Applier
skills.description: Apply approved content or layout changes to a CMS draft or staging environment.
skills.failure_contract: If the CMS rejects the change, stop and keep the draft unmodified.

skills.name: Universal Script Injector
skills.description: Package an approved script for safe site-wide insertion with explicit rollback hooks.
skills.failure_contract: Refuse to emit code if the insertion target or rollback path is missing.

skills.name: Rollback Executor
skills.description: Generate and execute a safe reversal path for any approved deployment.
skills.failure_contract: If no reversal path exists, report that rollback is unsupported and stop.

skills.name: Monitoring Binder
skills.description: Attach post-deploy metrics and health checks to the task lifecycle.
skills.failure_contract: Collect whatever metrics are available and label any gaps explicitly.

skills.name: Alert Router
skills.description: Route alerts when metrics deteriorate or rollback is required.
skills.failure_contract: Emit a warning without blocking the core workflow if the alert channel is unavailable.

skills.name: Amazon Ads Report
skills.description: Fetch Amazon Ads reports for SP/SB/SD. Automatically creates, waits, downloads, and extracts reports.
skills.failure_contract: Return structured error with httpStatus and failureReason for upstream failures.

skills.name: Amazon Ads Campaign Analyzer
skills.description: Analyze Amazon Ads campaign performance, calculate metrics, and generate optimization recommendations.
skills.failure_contract: Return partial analysis with available data if some reports fail.

skills.name: E-commerce Analysis
skills.description: Comprehensive e-commerce product listing, conversion funnel, and competitor analysis. Supports Amazon, Shopify, WooCommerce, and custom platforms.

html.description: Raw HTML content of product page

skills.failure_contract: Return partial analysis with available data if some sections cannot be analyzed.

skills.name: DataForSEO Keyword Research
skills.description: Real keyword data via DataForSEO API: search volume, CPC, competition, keyword suggestions, SERP analysis, competitor keywords, trending topics.
skills.failure_contract: Return structured error with missing API credentials guidance if DataForSEO env vars not configured.

skills.name: Ahrefs Site Explorer
skills.description: Real SEO data via Ahrefs API: domain rating, organic traffic, backlinks, referring domains, top pages, organic keywords.
skills.failure_contract: Return structured error with AHREFS_API_TOKEN setup guidance if not configured.

skills.name: Ahrefs Keyword Explorer
skills.description: Real keyword data via Ahrefs API: search volume, keyword difficulty, CPC, SERP overview, related keywords.
skills.failure_contract: Return structured error with AHREFS_API_TOKEN setup guidance if not configured.

skills.name: Amazon Ads Reporter (Python)
skills.description: Real Amazon Ads SP/SB/SD campaign and keyword reports via linkfox-amazon-ads-report skill scripts.
skills.failure_contract: Return structured error with dependency check guidance if linkfox-amazon-ads-auth not installed.

skills.name: Amazon Ads Node Reporter
skills.description: Lightweight Amazon Ads campaign and keyword reports via Node.js scripts. Supports bid inspection and keyword winner/dead analysis.
skills.failure_contract: Return structured error with AMAZON_ADS_PATH env var guidance if not configured.

skills.name: Web Scraper
skills.description: Read any webpage and return clean Markdown content, metadata, links, and images. Uses Jina Reader (free, no API key).
skills.failure_contract: Return structured error with HTTP status and URL details if scraping fails.

skills.name: YouTube Transcript
skills.description: Extract YouTube video transcripts, metadata, and subtitles. Requires yt-dlp installed.
skills.failure_contract: Return structured error with yt-dlp installation guidance if not available.

skills.name: RSS Feed Reader
skills.description: Read and parse RSS/Atom feeds for content monitoring.
skills.failure_contract: Return structured error with feedparser installation guidance if not available.
